ogTitle: Tannabar vs Tannas Mount: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tannabar and Tannas Mount.
heading: Tannabar vs Tannas Mount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tannabar, New South Wales and Tannas Mount, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tannabar has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Tannas Mount (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tannabar or Tannas Mount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tannabar has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Tannas Mount scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tannabar scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Tannas Mount scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tannabar or Tannas Mount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tannabar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
